jobUrl.title: Job URL
jobUrl.description: Direct URL to the original public Upwork job listing.

jobId.title: Job ID
jobId.description: Upwork job identifier parsed from the URL or page data when available.

postedAt.title: Posted at
postedAt.description: Public posted time text or normalized ISO timestamp when it can be inferred.

scrapedAt.title: Scraped at
scrapedAt.description: ISO timestamp when this Actor scraped the record.

jobType.title: Job type
jobType.description: Payment type displayed by Upwork, usually fixed or hourly.

fixedBudget.title: Fixed budget
fixedBudget.description: Fixed-price job budget in USD when visible.

hourlyMin.title: Hourly min
hourlyMin.description: Minimum hourly rate in USD when visible.

hourlyMax.title: Hourly max
hourlyMax.description: Maximum hourly rate in USD when visible.

experienceLevel.title: Experience level
experienceLevel.description: Experience level shown on the job, such as entry, intermediate, or expert.

estimatedDuration.title: Estimated duration
estimatedDuration.description: Estimated project duration shown on Upwork.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: Public job skills or tags extracted from the listing.

descriptionSnippet.title: Description snippet
descriptionSnippet.description: Short job description text visible in the search results.
descriptionSnippet.example: We need a Python developer to build a scraper and automate data exports.

fullDescription.title: Full description
fullDescription.description: Full public job description when includeDescription is enabled and available.
fullDescription.example: We need a Python developer to build a scraper and automate data exports...

clientCountry.title: Client country
clientCountry.description: Client country when publicly visible on the listing.

clientSpent.title: Client spent
clientSpent.description: Public total client spend text when visible.

proposalsCount.title: Proposals count
proposalsCount.description: Public proposal-count bucket when visible, such as Less than 5 or 20 to 50.

sourceSearchKeyword.title: Source keyword
sourceSearchKeyword.description: Input keyword that produced this result.

matchedKeywords.title: Matched keywords
matchedKeywords.description: Input keywords that appear in the title, description, or skills.

relevanceScore.title: Relevance score
relevanceScore.description: Simple 0-100 score based on keyword, skill, budget, experience, and recency matches.

overview.title: Upwork jobs
overview.description: Clean table of public Upwork job opportunities matching the input filters.
